items.raw_desc: Konzol jÃĄtÃĐk Darksiders: Warmastered Edition - PS5: The First Horseman of the ApocalypseDarksiders Warmastered Edition PS5 brings a dark action adventure where you take on the role of War, the first horseman of the Apocalypse. He is deceived by the forces of evil and wrongly accused of the premature end of the world. The conflict between Heaven and Hell spirals out of control and Earth falls into the hands of demonic armies. Uncover the conspiracyAfter a trial before the Charred Council, War is stripped of his powers and condemned. But he is given one last chance to return to the destroyed Earth, uncover the truth, and punish those who are truly responsible for the disaster.
